name: INNOVATIVE DESIGNS INC
summary: Innovative Designs, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company operating two business segments: house wrap for the building construction industry and cold weather clothing. Both segments use Insultex, a low-density polyethylene closed-cell foam with thermal, buoyancy, and scent-blocking properties. The company holds a license agreement with the Ketut Group for Insultex, sells products online and through distributors, and has worldwide distribution rights except Korea and Japan.

products.name: House Wrap (R-3 and R-6)
products.description: Multi-ply weatherization membrane made from Insultex providing moisture vapor transmission, air/water resistance, and R-value insulation for residential construction.

products.name: Arctic Armor Line
products.description: Cold weather jacket, bib, and gloves containing three layers of Insultex providing buoyancy, windproof, waterproof, and sub-zero temperature protection.

products.name: Swimeez Floating Swimwear
products.description: Swimwear with Insultex interior lining designed as a swim aid; discontinued in 2010, sold from existing inventory only.

products.name: Hunting Apparel Line
products.description: Hunting apparel using Insultex for near-total scent blocking; discontinued in 2010, sold from existing inventory only.

products.name: Insultex Material (Bulk)
products.description: Raw Insultex material sold in bulk to non-competing customers within the company's worldwide distribution jurisdiction.

products.name: House Wrap Tape
products.description: Tape product designed for use with the Insultex-based House Wrap product line.

partnerships.description: License and manufacturing agreement granting Innovative Designs worldwide Insultex distribution rights (excluding Korea and Japan) with fixed pricing for ten-year terms.
Agency engaged to assist in designing and continuously developing the company's website at www.idigear.com.
